content_body:
Axe Throwing Therapy is Blue Ridge's only axe-throwing activity! Interactive targets provide a fun and relaxed environment to enjoy. A touch screen at each lane allows you to change your target, keep score, and more!

Located in Downtown Blue Ridge and is open from noon to 10:00 p.m. 

Have some fun, get competitive, and even relieve some stress. 

Great team-building activity for corporate retreats, business retreats, and even couples retreats!
Take your Birthday Party to the next level with Axe Throwing Therapy ~
Great fun for families with teens

Whether you're a first-time axe thrower or an axe-throwin' pro, you will have a blast at Axe Throwing Therapy.
title: Axe Throwing Therapy
